scripts.postinstall: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; [p.exists() and p.chmod(p.stat().st_mode | 0o111) for p in [Path('node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-arm64/spawn-helper'), Path('node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds/darwin-x64/spawn-helper')]]"
scripts.build: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check renderer.js
